edges.expression: ROUND((dws_product_category_monthly.total_revenue - LAG(dws_product_category_monthly.total_revenue, 1, NULL) OVER (PARTITION BY dws_product_category_monthly.product_category_name_english ORDER BY dws_product_category_monthly.stat_month)) / NULLIF(LAG(dws_product_category_monthly.total_revenue, 1, NULL) OVER (PARTITION BY dws_product_category_monthly.product_category_name_english ORDER BY dws_product_category_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 100, 2) AS revenue_growth_rate

ROUND((dws_product_category_monthly.total_revenue - LAG(dws_product_category_monthly.total_revenue, 1, NULL) OVER (PARTITION BY dws_product_category_monthly.product_category_name_english ORDER BY dws_product_category_monthly.stat_month)) / NULLIF(LAG(dws_product_category_monthly.total_revenue, 1, NULL) OVER (PARTITION BY dws_product_category_monthly.product_category_name_english ORDER BY dws_product_category_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 100, 2) AS revenue_growth_rate

ROUND((dws_product_category_monthly.total_revenue - LAG(dws_product_category_monthly.total_revenue, 1, NULL) OVER (PARTITION BY dws_product_category_monthly.product_category_name_english ORDER BY dws_product_category_monthly.stat_month)) / NULLIF(LAG(dws_product_category_monthly.total_revenue, 1, NULL) OVER (PARTITION BY dws_product_category_monthly.product_category_name_english ORDER BY dws_product_category_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 100, 2) AS revenue_growth_rate

CASE WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 4 THEN '高价值客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要保持客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND (rfm_scored.f_score < 3 OR rfm_scored.m_score < 3) THEN '重要发展客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要挽留客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score < 3 THEN '流失预警客户' ELSE '一般价值客户' END AS customer_segment

CASE WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 4 THEN '高价值客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要保持客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND (rfm_scored.f_score < 3 OR rfm_scored.m_score < 3) THEN '重要发展客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要挽留客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score < 3 THEN '流失预警客户' ELSE '一般价值客户' END AS customer_segment

CASE WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 4 THEN '高价值客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要保持客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND (rfm_scored.f_score < 3 OR rfm_scored.m_score < 3) THEN '重要发展客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要挽留客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score < 3 THEN '流失预警客户' ELSE '一般价值客户' END AS customer_segment
RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY TO_DATE(dod.order_purchase_timestamp) ORDER BY SUM(dod.price + dod.freight_value) DESC) AS rank_num
RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY TO_DATE(dod.order_purchase_timestamp) ORDER BY SUM(dod.price + dod.freight_value) DESC) AS rank_num
RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY TO_DATE(dod.order_purchase_timestamp) ORDER BY SUM(dod.price + dod.freight_value) DESC) AS rank_num
ROUND((100 - seller_scored.revenue_rank + 1) * 0.6 + (CASE WHEN NOT seller_scored.avg_review_score IS NULL THEN seller_scored.avg_review_score * 20 ELSE 60 END) * 0.4, 2) AS performance_score
ROUND((100 - seller_scored.revenue_rank + 1) * 0.6 + (CASE WHEN NOT seller_scored.avg_review_score IS NULL THEN seller_scored.avg_review_score * 20 ELSE 60 END) * 0.4, 2) AS performance_score
ROUND((100 - seller_scored.revenue_rank + 1) * 0.6 + (CASE WHEN NOT seller_scored.avg_review_score IS NULL THEN seller_scored.avg_review_score * 20 ELSE 60 END) * 0.4, 2) AS performance_score

CASE WHEN ods_customer.customer_state IN ('AC', 'AP', 'AM', 'PA', 'RO', 'RR', 'TO') THEN 'Norte' WHEN ods_customer.customer_state IN ('AL', 'BA', 'CE', 'MA', 'PB', 'PE', 'PI', 'RN', 'SE') THEN 'Nordeste' WHEN ods_customer.customer_state IN ('DF', 'GO', 'MT', 'MS') THEN 'Centro-Oeste' WHEN ods_customer.customer_state IN ('ES', 'MG', 'RJ', 'SP') THEN 'Sudeste' WHEN ods_customer.customer_state IN ('PR', 'RS', 'SC') THEN 'Sul' ELSE 'Desconhecido' END AS customer_region

CASE WHEN p.product_weight_g IS NULL THEN 'unknown' WHEN p.product_weight_g < 200 THEN '轻' WHEN p.product_weight_g < 1000 THEN '中' WHEN p.product_weight_g < 5000 THEN '重' ELSE '超重' END AS product_weight_class

CASE WHEN ods_seller.seller_state IN ('AC', 'AP', 'AM', 'PA', 'RO', 'RR', 'TO') THEN 'Norte' WHEN ods_seller.seller_state IN ('AL', 'BA', 'CE', 'MA', 'PB', 'PE', 'PI', 'RN', 'SE') THEN 'Nordeste' WHEN ods_seller.seller_state IN ('DF', 'GO', 'MT', 'MS') THEN 'Centro-Oeste' WHEN ods_seller.seller_state IN ('ES', 'MG', 'RJ', 'SP') THEN 'Sudeste' WHEN ods_seller.seller_state IN ('PR', 'RS', 'SC') THEN 'Sul' ELSE 'Desconhecido' END AS seller_region
ROUND(SUM(dwd_order_detail.price + dwd_order_detail.freight_value) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT dwd_order_detail.order_id), 0), 2) AS avg_order_value
ROUND(SUM(dwd_order_detail.price + dwd_order_detail.freight_value) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT dwd_order_detail.order_id), 0), 2) AS avg_order_value
ROUND(SUM(dwd_order_detail.price + dwd_order_detail.freight_value) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT dwd_order_detail.order_id), 0), 2) AS avg_order_value
ROUND(SUM(dwd_order_detail.price + dwd_order_detail.freight_value) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT dwd_order_detail.order_id), 0), 2) AS avg_order_value
ROUND(SUM(dwd_order_detail.price + dwd_order_detail.freight_value) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT dwd_order_detail.order_id), 0), 2) AS avg_order_value
ROUND(SUM(dwd_order_detail.price + dwd_order_detail.freight_value) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT dwd_order_detail.order_id), 0), 2) AS avg_order_value
SUM(CASE WHEN dwd_order_detail.delivery_delay_days > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_delivery_count
SUM(CASE WHEN dwd_order_detail.delivery_delay_days = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_count
ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN dwd_order_detail.delivery_delay_days > 0 THEN dwd_order_detail.delivery_delay_days ELSE NULL END), 2) AS avg_delay_days
